notes: Replaced bootstrap placeholder with an actual Gamma-lane child ideation result.
Active claim review returned no live task claims at write time.

evidence.summary: C45 already turns requests into sovereign execution plans, locks execution mode, and keeps leased cognition provenance-explicit, so a separate inference microservice plane would duplicate route and substrate authority.

C42 already carries runtime handoff structure with optional inference policy reference while preserving the rule that priming is not execution and that C23 leases remain the only runtime start authority.
C47 already owns native model adaptation, quarantine, and reduction of leased-provider dependence without reintroducing runtime bridge dependency.
C36 is the canonical external boundary and requires all external interactions to pass through EMA-I receptors that emit C45-compatible bounded execution descriptors.
C39 already defines delegated sampling, streaming, and terminal result semantics, so a new inference-facing protocol family is not a missing authority surface.

C18 already treats leased cognition, sovereign compute, and Forge adaptation as first-order budget surfaces, implying the real open gap is compute-capacity governance rather than a standalone service facade.
C22 already assumes a bounded leased-cognition wrapper plus local/native fallback, which favors an internal substrate abstraction over a separately exposed model-serving layer.

T-300 explicitly blocks future architecture from drifting back toward old-stack externally shaped service assumptions; any new subsystem must strengthen Alternative C authority rather than recreate a compatibility-era layer.

lane_strategy: Break one core assumption and test a high-novelty replacement for the current task.

model_audit.routing_basis: AAS4 ordinary FULL_PIPELINE / IDEATION default future-branch routing target.

objective: Explore the most discontinuous redesign future for the current ideation problem. Apply that branch specifically to 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
one_sentence_thesis: Yes, transform the idea: the radical future is not an independent model inference microservice layer but a non-endpoint sovereign cognition substrate that allocates leased and native inference capacity internally beneath C45/C42 authority instead of exposing another service plane.

option_shapes.main_risk: Duplicates C45 route authority, collides with C36 external-boundary ownership, and invites old-stack backslide under T-300.
option_shapes.name: Literal Independent Microservice Layer
option_shapes.summary: Revive the idea as a separately addressable model-serving layer with its own service endpoints and routing.

option_shapes.main_risk: May still be too close to a conventional serving platform if it exposes model endpoints directly.
option_shapes.main_upside: Captures batching, warm-state reuse, policy-aware model selection, and cost controls without inventing a new public-facing protocol surface.
option_shapes.name: Sovereign Inference Fabric
option_shapes.summary: Recast the idea as an internal control plane for pooled model execution under C45 and C42.

option_shapes.main_risk: This is a larger subsystem than the original idea and would need very tight authority boundaries to avoid absorbing C45, C47, or C22 responsibilities.
option_shapes.main_upside: Breaks the endpoint assumption completely and turns inference into a governed internal capacity substrate spanning leased routes, native model pools, promotion state, and budget-aware placement.
option_shapes.name: Non-Endpoint Cognition Substrate
option_shapes.summary: Replace the microservice concept with an internal substrate that exposes no standalone external model service and is consumed only through existing sovereign execution and sampling authorities.

radical_shift.breaks_core_assumption: model inference should exist as an independently exposed microservice layer

recommended_next_action: Do not promote the literal layer. If the operator wants to keep the problem space, promote only a reframed FULL PIPELINE concept for an internal sovereign cognition substrate or inference fabric subordinate to C45, C42, C47, C18, and C22.
